desc: The align-content property is used to align the whole grid vertically inside the container.
start: The items are packed flush to each other toward the start edge of the alignment container in the cross axis
end: Aligns the grid to be flush with the end edge of the grid container.
center: The items are packed flush to each other toward the center of the alignment container along the cross axis.
stretch: The items are shown so that the combined size exactly fills the alignment container along the cross axis.
space-around: The empty space before the first and after the last item equals half of the space between each pair of adjacent items.
space-between: Place an even amount of space between each grid item, with no space at the far ends.
space-evenly: Place an even amount of space between each grid item, including the far ends.

_gridTemplateColumns.desc: Defines the line names and track sizing functions of the grid columns.

_gridTemplateRows.desc: Defines the line names and track sizing functions of the grid rows.

_gridColumnGap.desc: Sets the size of the gap between an element's columns. Can be 'normal', px, %, etc.

_gridRowGap.desc: Sets the size of the gap between an element's rows. Can be 'normal', px, %, etc.

desc: The justify-content property is used to align the whole grid horizontally inside the container.
start: The items are packed flush to each other toward the start edge of the alignment container in the cross axis
end: The items are packed flush to each other toward the end edge of the alignment container in the cross axis
center: The items are packed flush to each other toward the center of the alignment container along the cross axis.
stretch: The items are shown so that the combined size exactly fills the alignment container along the cross axis.
space-around: The empty space before the first and after the last item equals half of the space between each pair of adjacent items.
space-between: The first item is flush with the main-start edge, and the last item is flush with the main-end edge.
space-evenly: The spacing between each pair of adjacent items, the main-start edge and the first item, and the main-end edge and the last item, are all exactly the same.

_cssgridcss: {if alignContent <> ''}align-content:{alignContent}; {/if}{if gridTemplateColumns <> ''}grid-template-columns:{gridTemplateColumns!j}; {/if}{if gridTemplateRows <> ''}grid-template-rows:'{gridTemplateRows!j}'; {/if}{if gridTemplateAreas <> ''}grid-template-areas:{gridTemplateAreas!h}; {/if}{if gridColumnGap <> ''}grid-column-gap:{gridColumnGap}; {/if}{if gridRowGap <> ''}grid-row-gap:{gridRowGap}; {/if}{if justifyContent <> ''}justify-content:{justifyContent}; {/if}
